questions.q: How should you think about "Categories and morphisms" at this stage?
choices: A category organizes objects and arrows with associative composition and identities.
As a disconnected fact with no prerequisites
As a purely computational trick with no meaning
As optional notation not used elsewhere

As optional notation not used elsewhere
